idea: HVAC missed-call recovery concierge for small service businesses
best_bet_rationale: Missed calls directly map to lost HVAC revenue and are easy for owners to understand.
A manual concierge pilot can demonstrate value without full product development.
Warm access through a family connection increases odds of fast, honest feedback and pilot conversion.
core_hypothesis: Small HVAC owners with meaningful missed-call volume will show commitment within 7 days by paying for a pilot, granting operational access, or sharing real call data.

traits: missed calls during busy periods or after hours

commitment_signals_ranked: Agreement to start a live pilot this week
Sharing missed-call logs or call volume data
Intro to office manager or dispatcher with scheduled follow-up
seven_day_plan: Prepare one-page offer and define a narrow pilot with a clear paid ask.
Run 3-5 owner conversations, starting with the warm intro, and ask for specifics on missed calls and value.
Refine positioning based on objections and narrow the use case if needed.
Run one manual concierge simulation for the strongest prospect.
Ask directly for a paid pilot or equivalent commitment.
Follow up with maybes using a time-bound pilot message.
Score outcomes and decide proceed, narrow, or stop.

strong_validation: or 2 prospects willing to start a live pilot with operational access
or 3 prospects willing to share logs and enter implementation discussions
weak_validation: positive feedback without access or payment

recommended_pilot.scope: after-hours and missed inbound calls only
recommended_pilot.price_test: $250-$500 for a 2-week pilot, optionally credited forward

decision_rule: Continue only if real commitment appears within 7 days; otherwise narrow the segment/use case or stop.
